summary: Iteration 68 - Auto-Compose Recipes Feature. All features working correctly: (1) Backend POST /api/stock/recipes/auto-compose endpoint scans caisse products, applies keyword rules (_DISH_KEYWORD_RULES), and creates recipe fiches with 1 portion per ingredient. (2) Frontend 'Composer auto' button (amber, BookOpen icon) visible only for admin on Fiches Techniques tab. (3) Clicking button shows window.confirm with explanatory message, then calls API with only_unmatched=true. (4) Toast shows 'X fiche(s) créée(s) automatiquement' with description. (5) Auto-generated recipes have auto_generated=true and notes='Recette générée automatiquement (1 portion). À ajuster selon vos pratiques.' (6) Regression: existing recipes (Poulet braise, Portion type Riz Sauce Viande) intact, manual creation/editing works.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings in console about <tr> and <span> elements - does not affect functionality (same as iter 67)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend stock.py lines 1299-1485: _DISH_KEYWORD_RULES defines keyword→ingredient mappings (poulet, riz, salade, sauce, boissons, etc.). _compose_ingredients_for_dish() applies rules and finds best stock product match. AutoComposeBody model supports only_unmatched, skip_dishless, dry_run, department_filter parameters.

Frontend StockPage.jsx lines 1428-1458: 'Composer auto' button wrapped in {isAdmin && ...} for admin-only visibility. onClick shows window.confirm with explanatory message, then POSTs to /recipes/auto-compose with only_unmatched=true. Toast shows created_count and skipped counts.
Auto-generated recipes have auto_generated=true flag and standardized notes for easy identification and adjustment by managers.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 85 recipes (83 auto-generated + 2 original)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 68 added auto-compose recipes feature. Backend endpoint POST /api/stock/recipes/auto-compose scans caisse_products, applies keyword rules to identify ingredients, and creates recipe fiches with 1 portion. Frontend has 'Composer auto' button (amber, admin-only) on Fiches Techniques tab. Currently 85 recipes exist (83 auto-generated, 2 original). Recipe-based sales create stock movements with reason 'Vente (Recette: {name}) - Facture {id}'. E2E flow verified with 19 existing recipe-based sale movements.
